bankEditor.groupHint: Groups live in one file; saving writes it back. Id {{id}} is only used for the preview panel.
bankEditor.saveHintGroup: Save on Fields updates the group; save on this tab writes the whole file (same as the bank folder on disk).
bankEditor.saveHintSingle: Save writes the question back to its file.

mermaidModal.title: Mermaid / diagram
mermaidModal.previewFail: Preview failed (you can still insert source; PDF export needs mmdr locally)
mermaidModal.notSimpleFlow: Not a simple flowchart TD/LR; use the canvas to drag nodes and edges, or edit source on the left.
mermaidModal.intro: Left: source; right: live preview. Drag nodes, connect from handles, double-click to rename, <kbd class="rounded bg-slate-100 px-1">Delete</kbd> removes selection. Inserts a fenced diagram block (PDF needs mmdr).

mathOverlay.title: Insert equation
mathOverlay.hint: Edit below; on confirm inserts inline math ($...$) at the cursor.
